endpoints.name: Trigger Alert
endpoints.description: Triggers a new alert for your team. All team members on duty will receive alert notifications.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Confirms all visible alerts
endpoints.description: This method confirms all unhandled alerts your team currently has by a specific user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Acknowlegde multiple alerts
endpoints.description: This method confirms all alerts provided.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Close all acknowledged alerts.
endpoints.description: This method closes all acknowledged alerts your team currently has.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Close multiple alerts
endpoints.description: This method closes all alerts provided.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Gets alerts paged
endpoints.description: Gets alerts paged
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Alert Report
endpoints.description:
Returns information about the occurred alert volume in different time periods as well as information about the
response behaviour (amount of confirmed and unhandled alerts) of your team members.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Queue undo of multiple acknowledgments.
endpoints.description: This method tries to undo the acknowledgement of multiple alerts via a queue. The operation is handled in the background.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Withdraw closure of multiple alerts
endpoints.description: This method tries to undo multiple alert closes. The operation is handled in the background.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Alert
endpoints.description: Gets an alert by id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ALERTID}} with a real alertid.

endpoints.name: Acknowledge an alert
endpoints.description: Acknowledge an alert
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ALERTID}} with a real alertid.

endpoints.name: Annotate Alert
endpoints.description: Annotates an alert by given Annotation Info.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ALERTID}} with a real alertid.

endpoints.name: Get annotations of an alert
endpoints.description: Get annotations of an alert by id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ALERTID}} with a real alertid.

endpoints.name: Get attachments of an alert
endpoints.description: Get attachments of an alert by id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ALERTID}} with a real alertid.

endpoints.name: Gets a specified attachment of a specified alert.
endpoints.description: Gets a specified attachment of a specified alert.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ALERTID}} with a real alertid. Replace {{ATTACHMENTID}} with a real attachmentid.

endpoints.name: Close an alert
endpoints.description: Close an alert
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ALERTID}} with a real alertid.

endpoints.name: Get alert notifications
endpoints.description: Get notifications of all users by alert id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ALERTID}} with a real alertid.

endpoints.name: Get an overview alert.
endpoints.description: Get overview alert by id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ALERTID}} with a real alertid.

endpoints.name: Undo the acknowledgement of an alert.
endpoints.description: This method tries to undo an alert acknowledgement.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ALERTID}} with a real alertid.

endpoints.name: Undo the closure of an alert.
endpoints.description: This method tries to undo an alert close.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ALERTID}} with a real alertid.

endpoints.name:
Gets the names of all alert category images.
You can get the image by going to account.signl4.com/images/alerts/categoryImageName.svg
endpoints.description:
Gets the names of all alert category images.
You can get the image by going to account.signl4.com/images/alerts/categoryImageName.svg
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get all categories
endpoints.description:
Sample Request:
            
    GET /categories/cbb70402-1359-477f-ac92-0171cf2b5ff7
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TEAMID}} with a real teamid.

endpoints.name: Create a new category
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TEAMID}} with a real teamid.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TEAMID}} with a real teamid.

endpoints.name: Get a specific category
endpoints.description:
Sample Request:
            
    GET /categories/cbb70402-1359-477f-ac92-0171cf2b5ff7/c0054336-cd89-4abf-882d-ba69b5adb25e
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CATEGORYID}} with a real categoryid. Replace {{TEAMID}} with a real teamid.

endpoints.name: Update an existing category
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CATEGORYID}} with a real categoryid. Replace {{TEAMID}} with a real teamid.

endpoints.name: Delete an existing category
endpoints.description:
Sample Request:
            
    DELETE /categories/cbb70402-1359-477f-ac92-0171cf2b5ff7/c0054336-cd89-4abf-882d-ba69b5adb25e
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CATEGORYID}} with a real categoryid. Replace {{TEAMID}} with a real teamid.

endpoints.name: Get metrics for a specific category
endpoints.description:
Sample Request:

endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CATEGORYID}} with a real categoryid. Replace {{TEAMID}} with a real teamid.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{SIGNL4_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your SIGNL4 ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CATEGORYID}} with a real categoryid. Replace {{TEAMID}} with a real teamid.
